tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
# Step 1: Get all merged PRs that close a Linear issue
merged_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="merged")

# Filter for PRs that have a closes_linear value
prs_closing_linear = [pr for pr in merged_prs if pr.get("closes_linear")]

# Collect unique Linear issue IDs
linear_ids = list(set(pr["closes_linear"] for pr in prs_closing_linear))
